user_task_description: This report is out of order and the bookmark tree should match the corrected sequence.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Reorder the pages so the report reads `Scope -> Findings -> Recommendations -> Appendix`, then rebuild the bookmarks so `Site A` and `Site B` are nested under `Findings`.
atomic_scope: Only the page reorder and bookmark hierarchy rebuild are explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .pdf document with corrected page order and bookmark hierarchy.

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Page content should remain unchanged
- No theming work is required
